meta.title: UNCHAIN AI Advisory | Your outsourced AI officer for DX & AI
meta.description: A trusted AI advisor with research, business, and deployment experience. From DX foundations to AI adoption and governance. Tokyo based.

hero.subtitle: From evaluation to adoption. A trusted AI advisor who judges on three axes — technology, business, and risk — walks with your team end to end.

problem.title: Why DX and AI initiatives stall

items.label: Can't start
items.desc: Migration to Google Workspace or AWS remains untouched

items.label: Can't choose
items.desc: No clarity on which AI tools to adopt

items.label: Can't integrate
items.desc: No idea how to embed AI into daily workflows

items.label: No owner
items.desc: No internal leader who can judge and drive DX/AI

problem.closing: UNCHAIN functions as an actionable DX/AI advisor against all of these.

serviceFlow.title: Engagement flow
serviceFlow.desc: We start by carefully listening to your business model and operational realities, then chart a roadmap to resolution and walk with you through implementation and adoption.

stages.title: Hearing
stages.desc: Understand status from both management and field perspectives

stages.title: Problem mapping
stages.desc: Align on priorities and ROI expectations

virtuousCycle.title: The virtuous cycle we install
virtuousCycle.desc: By repeating business hearing → problem identification → AI implementation → adoption verification, we cultivate internal champions and build a permanent PDCA loop for productivity improvement.

whyChosen.title: Why UNCHAIN
whyChosen.intro: UNCHAIN is neither proposals without implementation, nor one-size-fits-all tool provisioning. With research-backed AI technology, hands-on deployment experience, and AI governance expertise, we support your risk-free AI adoption.

reasons.title: Research, business, and deployment
reasons.desc: A decision-making framework built on end-to-end experience from basic research to deployment.

reasons.title: Vendor-neutral
reasons.desc: No tool sales agenda. We select optimal solutions based on technology, business fit, and future scalability.

reasons.title: Governance by default
reasons.desc: Forbes-featured AI security expertise applied as standard to every engagement.

founder.name: Sonwoo Christian Park
founder.quote:
Not theory alone. Not the field alone.
Which is why I can judge — on the spot — whether something is technically feasible, commercially sound, and culturally fit for Japanese enterprises.
founder.narrative: Accepted into SoftBank Academia at 18, joining Masayoshi Son's next-generation leader program. Interned at the University of Tokyo Matsuo Lab CEO's office, co-founded Deepreneur (a Matsuo Lab AI startup), and conducted Forbes-featured AI security research as a Waseda University researcher. In 2025, spoke at the US-Japan Council annual conference. Drawing on experience spanning research, business, and policy, he provides an immediate decision-making framework as an AI advisor.

timeline.desc: Next-generation leader program by Masayoshi Son. Accepted at age 18
CEO's office intern. Engaged in Japan's top AI research
AI security research, featured in Forbes

founder.sectionTitle: Research, business, deployment — an AI advisor who has done all three.

projects.solution: Research data management × AI strategy design
projects.desc: Collaboration with UC Berkeley (IBI). Provided technical and operational support for complex academic data requirements — from secure cloud infrastructure design to AI adoption prioritization.

projects.solution: Legacy workflow preservation × AI priority design
projects.desc: For a 90-year-old company, respected existing workflows while identifying where AI would deliver the most impact. Achieved smooth adoption through partnership with corporate strategy.

Designed integration between existing factory systems used by craftsmen and modern AI. Delivered implementation blueprints by understanding field-level challenges that typical IT vendors cannot address.

rows.us: Comprehensive technical, business, and risk assessment
Designs adapted to Japanese business practices
Implementation design grounded in field realities
End-to-end support from DX foundation to AI utilization

pricing.title: Place your AI officer outside the company
pricing.subtitle: UNCHAIN provides mid-to-long-term partnership support based on monthly advisory contracts. Not one-off projects — we function as your continuous DX/AI partner.

pricing.footnote: * The above is advisory retainer pricing. Implementation and development work outside the advisory scope is quoted separately.

assurances.title: Vendor Neutral
assurances.desc: No tool sales agenda. We only provide optimal selection.

assurances.title: Security First
assurances.desc: Forbes-featured AI governance expertise included as standard.

assurances.title: Enablement Included
assurances.desc: Internal AI champion training available as an option.

items.quote: Rather than simply deploying tools, we could consult from the design stage on how to safely and efficiently manage research data. They resolved complex requirements unique to academic institutions from both technical and operational angles.

We had no AI experts internally and were lost on where to begin. UNCHAIN respected our 90-year-old workflows while clearly identifying priorities — 'AI-ify this area for maximum impact' — enabling smooth adoption.

Integrating existing systems used by craftsmen with cutting-edge AI is something most IT vendors can't relate to. They understood our messy field-level challenges and drew an 'implementation blueprint' for factory system integration.
Hardware-AI integration is notoriously difficult, but with their R&D background serving as a technical sparring partner, we've been running from PoC to implementation at maximum speed.

ladder.title: Advisory is only the entry point
ladder.closing: Advisory is the entry point for UNCHAIN to become the AI decision-making layer for Japanese enterprises.
